source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/MAF95310/PCN_8G-2024_Mini Nanoblade FLEX.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Ezurio PCN 8G-2024 announces a company-name/logo labeling and packaging change from Laird Connectivity to Ezurio for affected antenna assemblies.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as manufacturer PCN evidence for affected part numbers, change description, impact statement, identification method, and factory effectivity timing.
keyPoints: Affected products include EMF2449A1-10MH4L, EMF2449A1-10UFL, MAF95310, and EMF2449A2-10MHF1.
The company name has been officially changed from Laird Connectivity to Ezurio.
For the affected antennas, identification is by bag label; manufacturing date on the bag label will be September 2024 or later.
The change is implemented from September 2024 onwards as a running change into production planning.
Ezurio states there are no electrical RF implications and no form, fit, or functional changes.

evidence.claim: MAF95310 is an affected product in PCN 8G-2024.
The change is due to the company name change from Laird Connectivity to Ezurio.
evidence.evidenceText: This change is being implemented because the company name has been officially changed from Laird Connectivity to Ezurio.
evidence.pageTarget: Laird Connectivity to Ezurio name change

evidence.claim: Product labels and product packaging that previously displayed the Laird Connectivity logo will feature the updated Ezurio logo.
evidence.evidenceText: all product PCB Silkscreen labeling (If company logo is printed on the silkscreen) and packaging that previously displayed the Laird Connectivity logo will now feature the updated Ezurio logo.

evidence.claim: For these antennas, there are no antenna silkscreen changes and the change is strictly a bag label update.
evidence.evidenceText: Logo is not on the silkscreen so no antenna silkscreen changes – strictly a bag label update.

evidence.claim: Changed product can be identified by a bag label manufacturing date of September 2024 or later.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturing date on the bag label will be September 2024 or later

evidence.claim: The factory effectivity date is September 2024 onwards as a running change.
evidence.evidenceText: From September 2024 onwards, this will be implemented as a running change into our production planning for these antennas.

evidence.claim: Ezurio states the change has no electrical RF implications and no form, fit, or functional changes.
evidence.evidenceText: there are no electrical RF implications for this change. There is no form, fit or functional changes.
